metadata.title: Timesheets | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered timesheet management platform for all your time tracking operations — from automated time tracking and validation to invoicing, reporting, and billable hours optimization.

hero.title: Don't waste time.
hero.description: Adon Timesheets allows you to automate time tracking, eliminate leakage, and boost billable hours. All with an interface powered by smart recommendations.
hero.floatingNote: Everything time by team has been auto suggested already

hoursSection.title: Where did all those hours go?
hoursSection.description: Smart time tracking. Launch a timer on the fly, and ensure that timesheets are always linked to the correct project, task, or sales order. No more missing data.

productivitySection.title: Make every minute count
productivitySection.description: Keep it profitable. Get an overview of your billable time by team member, project, task, and billing type.

features.title: Views
features.description: Switch between 5 different views as per your needs.

features.title: Reminders
features.description: Send reminders to users that have timesheets to encode or validate.

features.title: Sales orders
features.description: Link sales orders or services to timesheets.

features.title: Invoicing
features.description: Start and stop the timer from anywhere using keyboard shortcuts. Save time immediately with a task log.

features.title: Access rights
features.description: Grant or restrict your team's access.

viewsDemo.title: Views
viewsDemo.description: Switch between 5 different views as per your needs.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Our day-to-day tasks have become simpler, and we have been able to complete them in less time. Thanks to Adon automation and integration features, our work efficiency has grown significantly.
testimonial.name: Martins Carvalho
